narrative:
Liberty Township has 32,650 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.4 percentage points.
